name: preuser-plugins
description: preuser's Claude Code plugins — set up preuser on your repo, author journeys, and seal credentials for the AI user.

plugins.name: preuser
plugins.description: Set up preuser on a repo: /preuser:setup drafts your .preuser/config.yml (journeys + app bring-up) so an AI user can walk your app once per PR; /preuser:seal encrypts a login credential to commit as ciphertext.
